author: y4rr
content: Plan: Build conformance_serialize_sharded.rs. The source already has all sharded loader functions; this is purely test infrastructure. Use tempfile to create an in-memory fixture directory with index.json + 2-3 shard .safetensors files. Tests: load_safetensors_sharded round-trip, load_safetensors_sharded_filtered, load_safetensors_sharded_with_progress, load_safetensors_auto (sharded dispatch), ShardProgress fields. Remove corresponding cascade_skip in conformance_serialize.rs and #851 exclusion entries from _surface_exclusions.toml.
